metadata.title: Why Fixing the Model Didn't Fix the Bias

beats.title: Liam cold open — ClaudeComposerAsk
beats.narration_text: The causal-pipe picture reframed everything for me — model, proxy, and deployment paths carrying flow in parallel, so blocking the model path just reroutes it. The zip code carrying eighteen of the original twenty-two points is the smoking gun. Help me (1) draw the causal chain and quantify how much disparity each pipe carries, (2) simulate retraining without the protected attribute and show the flow rerouting through the proxy, and (3) intervene on the deployment-context path and measure why that single move cuts the gap tenfold.

props.command: The causal-pipe picture reframed everything for me — model, proxy, and deployment paths carrying flow in parallel, so blocking the model path just reroutes it. The zip code carrying eighteen of the original twenty-two points is the smoking gun. Help me (1) draw the causal chain and quantify how much disparity each pipe carries, (2) simulate retraining without the protected attribute and show the flow rerouting through the proxy, and (3) intervene on the deployment-context path and measure why that single move cuts the gap tenfold.
props.segment: Why Fixing the Model Didn't Fix

beats.narration_text: Why fixing the model didn't fix the bias.

card.copy:
Why Fixing the Model
Didn't Fix the Bias

beats.narration_text: Two expert teams — one rewrote the loss function, one resampled the data. Both produced small reductions. A third team changed nothing in the model and cut the disparity tenfold.
Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and where was the leverage actually hiding?

props.headline: Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and…

card.copy: Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and where was the leverage actually hiding?

beats.narration_text: The natural assumption: bias lives in the model. Fix the model's learning rule, fix the disparity. Reasonable. And mostly wrong.
Bias flows from protected attribute to outcome along three parallel paths — model, proxy features, and deployment context. An intervention only blocks the path it sits on.
The team that succeeded drew a different kind of picture.

props.headline: The team that succeeded drew a different kind of picture.

beats.image_description: A whiteboard with a causal diagram drawn in marker, arrows connecting boxes labeled with pipeline stages, in a conference room setting

beats.narration_text: Draw the full causal chain. Bias flows down each pipe simultaneously. Block one, and the flow reroutes through the others.
Most algorithmic interventions block one path — the one running through the model's parameters — and leave the proxy paths and the deployment-context paths fully open.
Team one blocked the model path. The flow rerouted through the proxy and review pipes. The bias barely moved.
Team three blocked the deployment-context pipe — the one carrying most of the flow. The disparity fell ninety percent.
You can intervene on what is in your house. But your intervention will be at the wrong leverage point, and the disparity will persist.

A lending model shows a twenty-two point approval gap between groups. Engineers retrain it without protected attributes — the gap in the model's learned weights drops to seven points. But zip code remains in the features and carries eighteen points of the original gap on its own path. Final approval gap: twenty points. The model fix moved the flow. It didn't stop it.
The model is never the only pipe. Find the one carrying the most flow.

props.headline: The model is never the only pipe. Find the one carrying…

card.copy: The model is never the only pipe.
card.sub: Find the one carrying the most flow.

beats.title: Liam verdict — ClaudeVerdictArtifact
beats.narration_text: Let's recap with Claude. Here's what the body just demonstrated. You can intervene on what is in your house. But your intervention will be at the wrong leverage point, and the disparity will persist. A lending model shows a twenty-two point approval gap between groups. Engineers retrain it without protected attributes — the gap in the model's learned weights drops to seven points. But zip code remains in the features and carries eighteen points of the original gap on its own path. Final approval gap: twenty points. The model fix moved the flow. It didn't stop it.
